name: Atmosly
description: AI-powered Kubernetes platform combining developer portal, CI/CD, CIS compliance scanning, and FinOps automation.

seo.title: Atmosly — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Atmosly: AI-powered Kubernetes platform combining developer portal, CI/CD, CIS compliance scanning, and FinOps automation.

when_to_use: AI-powered Kubernetes internal developer portal for platform teams
CIS compliance scanning integrated into Kubernetes GitOps
FinOps automation and cost showback inside Kubernetes clusters
Simplifying K8s onboarding for developer teams without SRE

pros: AI assistant speeds up k8s ops
cons: Young product with shifting feature set
Opinionated workflows may not fit all teams
Depth per feature trails dedicated tools
review.verdict: A promising all-in-one Kubernetes platform, but expect gaps versus best-of-breed point tools.
review.best_for: Small platform teams wanting one pane of glass over k8s
review.not_for: Mature orgs already invested in Backstage, Argo, and Kubecost
